scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd apps/backend dev" "bun run --cwd apps/frontend dev"
scripts.deploy:fe: VITE_BACKEND_URL=https://decktype-be.vercel.app bun run build:fe && wrangler pages deploy apps/frontend/dist --project-name decktype --branch main
scripts.deploy:all: bun run deploy:be && bun run deploy:fe
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/backend typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/frontend typecheck
